text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While on a walk one day, I happen to<n>see a
familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! B-bakushin!Bakushiiiin!
choice_data_list: Is that... Bakushin O's little sister?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The one and only! Hello! We're<n>training for her
next Uma Kids<n>Footrace Meet!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I think back to when I watched the<n>Footrace Meet
the other day, recalling<n>that Sakura Bakushin O's
sister<n>didn't place as high as she'd hoped.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Finishing tenth really stuck with her.<n>She's been
training hard ever since.<n>Chasing the Bakushin, in
her words.
choice_data_list: Are you spotting for her too, Chiyono O?
Are you spotting for her too, Chiyono O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm friends with Bakushin<n>O—we're in the
same club.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's how I got to know her sister.<n>We cook
together sometimes, and<n>she makes the most
amazing<n>sweets! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Still, something's off. She<n>usually runs
faster than this.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna Bakushin... and become<n>the ultimate
racer... just like my<n>sister!
choice_data_list: You're right. Her running form is a little stiff.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Her form?! I see! I see?!
choice_data_list: Mind if I help out with this training session?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Would you?! In that case, since<n>we're about to
break for lunch, I'd<n>like your advice about her
regimen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Stomachs, full! Brains, picked! Time to<n>get back to
train—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, no, hold that thought! Check<n>out that sign!
"Face our fast-paced,<n>full-on food challenge"?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Fast-paced? That's the essence of<n>Bakushin! As
a big sister, I've gotta<n>step up and set a shining
example!
choice_data_list: But it says nobody's ever beaten the challenge!
But it says nobody's ever beaten the challenge!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
T-then I'd better Bakushin with you,<n>Sis!
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A-are you sure about this?! Even a<n>grown-up
Umamusume couldn't<n>finish that much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't listen to her! Let us rise to the<n>challenge, my
dear sister! Our<n>combined Bakushin will ensure
victory!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Their combined Bakushin did not<n>ensure victory.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh... It was a formidable opponent.But I won't stay down. Once I powerup into my second and third forms, I'llgo back for a rematch. Burp.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Eh-hehe... I couldn't even finish half<n>of what you
managed...

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
My time's not improving either. It's<n>hard to
Bakushin...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While Sakura Bakushin O seems fine,<n>her little
sister's glum mood starts to<n>worry me. I rack my
brain for a way<n>to cheer her up.
choice_data_list: Check it out! Those sweets look delicious!
Check it out! Those sweets look delicious!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um... I think more food is the last thing<n>we need
right now...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: My suggestion falls flat.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... don't they remind you of the<n>sweets we
made that one time, Big<n>Sis?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Now that takes me back! You<n>were such a
good teacher that it<n>convinced me you'd grow up
to be a<n>model class rep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You said it! But she's got more than<n>just teaching
up her sleeve!<n>Cleaning, laundry, sewing,
handicrafts—she can do it all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's like everything is a piece of cake<n>for her—even
the stuff I don't excel<n>at!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Aw, Big Sis! Delicate work's really<n>not your
strong suit, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: AH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I know exactly what my<n>little sister
needs!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: You do? What is it?! Tell me, tell me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In due time, sister of mine. But<n>there's something
I must prepare<n>first—alone!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, we're done for today!<n>Class
dismissed!
choice_data_list: Sure. Good luck with your mystery prep work!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for understanding! Now if<n>you'll excuse
me, I'm off to get<n>started!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There she goes... You think she'll<n>really be okay
alone?
choice_data_list: She seemed to think so. Let's trust her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The rest of us disperse, all of us<n>wondering what
Sakura Bakushin O<n>could be up to.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, I must decline! That's one thing I<n>won't budge
on!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No matter what, I have to do this by<n>myself!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It appears that for the sake of her<n>sister's
improvement, Sakura<n>Bakushin O must accomplish
this<n>mission of hers alone.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I hear word that her<n>sister did
quite well in a recent<n>competition.
